title: OptimizedVisuals
description: Make Minecraft look beautiful without your PC bursting into flames!
body:
Make Minecraft look beautiful without your PC bursting into flames! What this modpack adds: Tons of optimization mods QOL Recourse Packs Shaders How does this modpack run? Ryzen 5 4000 & GTX 1650 With Shaders & all packs: 73-77 FPS All packs and no shaders: 129 - 134 FPS *These results are subjective*
